text:
First, note that time zones in 1020 were not standardized as today, but for this exercise we assume modern time zone offsets for the given locations.  

Australia/Sydney is AEDT (UTC+11) in November.  
Asia/Singapore is SST (UTC+8) year-round.  

Time difference: UTC+8 − UTC+11 = −3 hours.  
So Singapore is 3 hours behind Sydney.  

2 PM Sydney = 14:00 Sydney time.  
14:00 − 3 hours = 11:00 same date (November 15, 1020).  

FINAL_ANSWER: 1020-11-15 11:00
